hero.title: Stop managing the pain. Resolve it at the source.
hero.lede: A 90-minute initial consultation and detailed movement instruction that goes beyond conventional PT, corrective-exercise, and mobility work — trained through Functional Patterns.

stats.label: Functional Patterns · Human Biomechanics Specialist L1
Resolving my own body & chronic pain first-hand

steps.label: what happens in your first consultation
steps.title: Three steps. Movement detail other methodologies miss.

items.title: Intake & history
items.body: Where it hurts, what's been tried, what you want to get back to — work, sport, picking up your kid.

items.title: Biomechanical screen
items.body: A Functional Patterns postural & gait assessment to identify the compensations driving your pain — not just where you feel it.

items.title: Detailed movement instruction
items.body: Hands-on cueing and corrective work at a level of detail conventional PT, corrective exercise, and mobility routines don't reach. You leave knowing exactly how to move.

ctaBand.title: Let's find out what's actually driving it.
ctaBand.sub: Initial consultation · 90 mins · in-studio Malvern East or online
